prompt: Feedback with internal contradiction: user wants the right panel 'wider but not taking so much space'. Also mentions cramped text and hard-to-hit close button. One screenshot.

assertions.text: Extracts 2-3 findings matching user's distinct observations (cramped text, map displacement, close button)
Uses [CLARIFY] tag on contradictory feedback ('wider but not taking so much space') rather than picking a side
Proposes concrete options for the contradictory requirement (overlay vs resize vs other)
Does NOT add findings about issues the user didn't mention (colors, fonts, data content)
